labels.ideal_content_profile: Wide landscape drone pulls, slow ridge tracks, silhouettes against sunrises, emotional epic storytelling.
Static wide landscapes, ambient long takes, mirrored reflections, alpine lakes.
Slow hiking b-roll, candid trail moments, intimate close-ups.
Drone footage with rhythmic synth pulses; landscape b-roll with cool atmospherics.
Friend-group nightlife, fast-cut faces, neon bars.
Street-level fashion, fast cuts, swagger walks.
